title: Hot Questions
description: Track frequently asked questions, identify fallback patterns and check intent trends.
question: Question
notFoundHint: Try changing search or filter criteria.
searchPlaceholderExtended: Search by question, normalized content, intent...
resultsUpdateHint: Results will update 1 second after you stop typing
overviewHint: A snapshot of hot questions in the system.
fallbackSummary: {{questions}} unique questions were fallback-ed, totaling {{asks}} asks.
noTopIntents: No top intents for hot questions yet.
questionTableHint: Filter by intent, fallback status, keywords and click each row for details.
noResults: No hot question results for the current filters.
sectionHint: Question table is on the left, top intents are on the right.
detailDescription: Chunks used for the assistant's most recent answer.
noAssistantMessage: No assistant message associated with this hot question.
noChunksRecorded: No chunks recorded for this assistant message.
selectQuestionHint: Select a question in the table to view details.
topIntentsHint: Most frequently asked intent groups in hot question stats.
